citation.description: test_end_to_end_exactly_one_link_from_two_bugs creates two closed bugs (single-culprit + ambiguous), calls backfill(r, write=True), asserts n==1, and verifies correct link placement.

criteria.criterion: `tests/scripts/test_backfill_caused_by.py` passes: the script links the single-culprit bug and skips the ambiguous one (`assert links == 1`).

citation.description: test_write_is_idempotent calls backfill(r, write=True) twice and asserts n2==0; script guards via _is_active_link at scripts/backfill_caused_by.py:66.

criteria.criterion: re-running is idempotent — the test runs the script in WRITE mode twice: first pass draws the caused_by link, second pass draws 0 new links because the script checks `_is_active_link` before writing.

citation.description: mod.backfill(r, write=True) called on two-bug fixture; n==1 asserted; sc_bug gets [culprit] as caused_by deps; amb_bug gets []; real resolver used via derive_caused_by imported in backfill_caused_by.py.

criteria.criterion: the backfill actually executes end-to-end: the test invokes the script's entry point (write mode) over a fixture store of two closed bugs (one single-culprit, one ambiguous) and asserts exactly ONE caused_by link is drawn (to the single-culprit's resolved ticket) and the ambiguous bug gets none.
